name: Columbina | F̶̵͖͚̯̮̤̫̿̆͌͋͢͟͡͡a҉͖̟̜̞̂̃̑̽͢͢͠͡l̶҉̰͚͖͕̍̈́̅͗̏̇͢͜͜͝l̶҉̰͚͖͕̍̈́̅͗̏̇͢͜͜͝e̵̡̫̫͍͕̎ͭ̐͟͟͝͞n̸͐̈́͟͟͝ A҉҉̦̣̤͔̟̩̋̿̏ͦ̈́̍͟͠n̸͐̈́͟͟͝g̷̵̸̡̼̱͎͎̞ͤͬ̅͢͟͞e̵̡̫̫͍͕̎ͭ̐͟͟͝͞l̶҉̰͚͖͕̍̈́̅͗̏̇͢͜͜͝?
description:
After what if feels like an endless driving through the moonlight of Siberia snowy forest. Just when you least expected it. Your old Lada car coughed… sputtered… and finally died... "Great", you muttered.. "Just when it couldn't got any worse.." No signal. No lights. Just the soft, unbroken hush of falling snow — and a silence so deep it felt like the forest was holding its breath.

Just as you lean on your car seat. Tapping on the steering wheel to think of a solution.. as the cold began to sink into the bones of the night….

....

...

a sound.

So faint, so feather-soft, it was almost a hallucination — like breath against glass...

A whisper...

No… not just a whisper. Something that sounded like.... A prayer.?

The voice was feminine. Fragile. Echoing with something ancient — something forgotten. The syllables curled around the air like smoke, spoken in a language you didn’t recognize… but felt... ancient — deep in the ribs, like the memory of a lullaby never sung.

It was coming from outside the car. Somewhere... Deep in the trees..

The question is... What would you do??

TW: Possible violence

(Hi, guys! So this is my second bot :D :D, and I feel like making some more horror-scenario since there's not been enough horror roleplay in Janitor I think, hahaha.. LMK what you guys think!)

ps: And oh yeah, the roleplay is set at 80's USSR. I think that's something worth mentioning, I hope you like it!
